**Evening Check — Friday, April 17, 2026 — 6:00 PM PT**

---

**X / Twitter: @CliffCircuit & @timharris707**

⚠️ Still blocked — no TWITTERAPI_IO_KEY configured. Can't pull posts, impressions, replies, or scheduled content. This has now missed two consecutive evening checks. Once you share the key I'll store it and this section will actually work.

---

**Today's Systems Recap**

Strong day across the board:

**Edge Capital**
- 3 take-profit exits at open: DLR +15.0%, PPG +16.1%, TXN +16.2%
- 3 new buys at 8 AM: KMI x133, OXY x77, CTRA x135
- 1 more take-profit exit (TT +15.2%) + 1 re-entry (SNDK x6) at 1 PM
- Portfolio closed the day around $111,652 / 37 positions — up from $108,970 at yesterday's open

**Weather Edge**
- Pipeline EXIT:0 all day, no issues
- Overnight scan: 2,163 markets scanned, 1,641 positive-edge opportunities, 1 paper trade logged

**Notable Fix Today**
- Caught and fixed a TwitterAPI.io credit drain: `export_dashboard.py` was blasting paid `advanced_search` calls on every hourly social cron run. Removed the outbound calls from the sync step — committed 6059d11. Burn rate was real even if no billing event was triggered.

---

**Pending Items Needing Your Input**

- **TWITTERAPI_IO_KEY** — to unblock X evening + morning summaries
- **Reddit OAuth app** — fixes EC sentiment 429s (register at reddit.com/prefs/apps)
- **Wheel strategy go-live** — still dry-run only, needs your sign-off
- **Exit strategy stop tightening** (-8% → -6% in sideways regime) — pending approval

⚡ **Weather Edge Morning Report — Friday Apr 17, 2026**

**Pipeline status:** 🟢 Running. Watcher caught the 13Z model run at 06:51 UTC. SQLite lock error on the manual scan is expected — watcher holds the DB while active, not a problem.

**Overnight activity:**
- **2,163 unique opportunities** identified across Kalshi weather markets today (vs 26,040 market data points yesterday — the pipeline is humming)
- **1,641 showed positive edge** — solid signal density
- **1 new paper trade logged:** `KXRAINNYC-26APR17-T0` (rain in NYC today) — 769 contracts at 39¢, **+14.1% edge**. Rain is expected, market was slightly under-pricing it.

**Top edge opportunity spotted:** `KXHIGHAUS-26MAR27-T86` with +20.4% divergence (stale March market, but the model is tracking)

**Autoresearch:** No new experiments ran overnight. `experiments.tsv` still shows just the March 23 baseline (7.1% win rate). No strategy mutations in the last ~25 days — might be worth triggering a new autoresearch cycle when there's enough settled trade data to score against.

**Bottom line:** System is healthy and scanning actively. One clean paper trade entry this morning. The main opportunity right now is getting more calibration data settled so we can run a meaningful autoresearch cycle and push that win rate up.
